title: Portfolio Governance Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Portfolio Governance skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

active_initiative_inventory.description: Active initiative inventory with current status, budget consumption, schedule variance and strategic objective alignment

resource_capacity_plan.description: Resource capacity plan showing supply and demand for shared resources (technology, data, program staff, executive sponsorship)

risk_issue_logs.description: Risk and issue logs for each active initiative

strategic_objectives_alignment.description: Strategic objectives and the alignment mapping between each initiative and those objectives

benefit_realization_tracking.description: Benefit realization tracking data showing actual versus forecast benefits for completed or in-flight initiatives

stage.description: Stage-gate criteria defining the governance decision points for each initiative lifecycle stage

benefit_dependency_networks.description: Benefit dependency networks showing how initiative outputs combine to produce strategic outcomes
